prompt_preview:
You are a classical planning system. You are given a planning domain and a problem both in PDDL syntax.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the executable plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no natural-language commentary, no markdown unless it is a

message.content:
```pddl
(register_itinerary incoming_leg_1)
(reserve_vehicle_for_itinerary incoming_leg_1 vehicle_token_1)
(allocate_time_slot_to_itinerary incoming_leg_1 timeslot_1)
(confirm_itinerary_schedule incoming_leg_1 timeslot_1)
(prepare_incoming_leg_pickup incoming_leg_1 pickup_option_main_entrance timeslot_1)
(assign_operator_to_itinerary incoming_leg_1 operator_staff_1)
(confirm_incoming_pickup_with_operator incoming_leg_1 pickup_option_main_entrance operator_staff_1)
(release_operator_from_itinerary incoming_leg_1 operator_staff_1)
(release_time_slot_for_itinerary incoming_leg_1 timeslot_1)
(register_itinerary outgoing_leg_1)
(reserve_vehicle_for_itinerary outgoing_leg_1 vehicle_token_2)
(allocate_time_slot_to_itinerary outgoing_leg_1 timeslot_1)
(confirm_itinerary_schedule outgoing_leg_1 timeslot_1)
(prepare_outgoing_leg_dropoff outgoing_leg_1 dropoff_option_main_exit timeslot_1)
(assign_operator_to_itinerary outgoing_leg_1 operator_staff_1)
(confirm_outgoing_dropoff_with_operator outgoing_leg_1 dropoff_option_main_exit operator_staff_1)
(release_operator_from_itinerary outgoing_leg_1 operator_staff_1)
(release_time_slot_for_itinerary outgoing_leg_1 timeslot_1)
(allocate_time_slot_to_itinerary incoming_leg_1 timeslot_1)
(assign_transfer_vehicle_instance incoming_leg_1 outgoing_leg_1 pickup_option_main_entrance dropoff_option_main_exit transfer_shuttle_1)
(prepare_vehicle_for_handling transfer_shuttle_1 incoming_leg_1 timeslot_1)
(complete_incoming_leg_handoff_with_vehicle incoming_leg_1 transfer_shuttle_1)
(complete_outgoing_leg_handoff_with_vehicle outgoing_leg_1 transfer_shuttle_1)
(issue_storage_receipt_to_itinerary incoming_leg_1 storage_receipt_1 timeslot_1)
(finalize_incoming_leg_and_release_vehicle_token incoming_leg_1 vehicle_token_1 storage_receipt_1)
(release_time_slot_for_itinerary incoming_leg_1 timeslot_1)
(allocate_time_slot_to_itinerary outgoing_leg_1 timeslot_1)
(issue_storage_receipt_to_itinerary outgoing_leg_1 storage_receipt_1 timeslot_1)
(finalize_outgoing_leg_and_release_vehicle_token outgoing_leg_1 vehicle_token_2 storage_receipt_1)
(release_time_slot_for_itinerary outgoing_leg_1 timeslot_1)
(register_itinerary central_storage_facility)
(reserve_vehicle_for_itinerary central_storage_facility vehicle_token_3)
(allocate_time_slot_to_itinerary central_storage_facility timeslot_1)
(confirm_itinerary_schedule central_storage_facility timeslot_1)
(assign_service_slot_to_facility central_storage_facility service_slot_10am)
(provision_equipment_to_facility central_storage_facility equipment_trolley_1)
(assign_operator_to_itinerary central_storage_facility operator_staff_1)
(reserve_storage_container_for_facility central_storage_facility storage_container_101 transfer_shuttle_1)
(provision_storage_container central_storage_facility storage_container_101 transfer_shuttle_1 timeslot_1)
(stage_facility_for_handoff_with_equipment central_storage_facility equipment_trolley_1 operator_staff_1 storage_container_101 transfer_shuttle_1)
(authorize_facility_service_slot central_storage_facility service_slot_10am storage_container_101 transfer_shuttle_1)
(finalize_container_preparation central_storage_facility)
(issue_storage_receipt_to_itinerary central_storage_facility storage_receipt_1 timeslot_1)
(finalize_facility_and_release_vehicle_token central_storage_facility vehicle_token_3 storage_receipt_1)
(release_time_slot_for_itinerary central_storage_facility timeslot_1)
(release_service_slot_from_facility central_storage_facility service_slot_10am)
(release_equipment_from_facility central_storage_facility equipment_trolley_1)
(release_operator_from_itinerary central_storage_facility operator_staff_1)
(register_itinerary satellite_storage_facility)
(reserve_vehicle_for_itinerary satellite_storage_facility vehicle_token_1)
(allocate_time_slot_to_itinerary satellite_storage_facility timeslot_1)
(confirm_itinerary_schedule satellite_storage_facility timeslot_1)
(assign_service_slot_to_facility satellite_storage_facility service_slot_10am)
(provision_equipment_to_facility satellite_storage_facility equipment_trolley_1)
(assign_operator_to_itinerary satellite_storage_facility operator_staff_1)
(reserve_storage_container_for_facility satellite_storage_facility storage_container_102 transfer_shuttle_1)
(provision_storage_container satellite_storage_facility storage_container_102 transfer_shuttle_1 timeslot_1)
(stage_facility_for_handoff_with_equipment satellite_storage_facility equipment_trolley_1 operator_staff_1 storage_container_102 transfer_shuttle_1)
(authorize_facility_service_slot satellite_storage_facility service_slot_10am storage_container_102 transfer_shuttle_1)
(finalize_container_preparation satellite_storage_facility)
(issue_storage_receipt_to_itinerary satellite_storage_facility storage_receipt_1 timeslot_1)
(finalize_facility_and_release_vehicle_token satellite_storage_facility vehicle_token_1 storage_receipt_1)
```
message.reasoning:
The problem involves a luggage storage scenario with incoming_leg_1, outgoing_leg_1, central_storage_facility, satellite_storage_facility, and various resources.


## Examining luggage storage scenario
- The problem involves managing luggage across incoming_leg_1, outgoing_leg_1, central_storage_facility, and satellite_storage_facility.
- Various resources are available, suggesting a need to optimize storage and transfer processes.

## Examining luggage storage scenario
- All resources, including vehicle tokens, time slots, operators, and luggage units, start available with no initial bookings.
- The process begins by registering itineraries, which include incoming_leg_1, outgoing_leg_1, central_storage_facility, and satellite_storage_facility, all categorized under itineraries.

## Clarifying itinerary roles
- Incoming_leg_1 and outgoing_leg_1 are leg_category itineraries, while central_storage_facility and satellite_storage_facility are facility_role_category itineraries.
- Both storage facilities, central and satellite, use the same vehicle_instance, transfer_shuttle_1, and serve both legs, with storage_container_101 for central and 102 for satellite.

## Outlining handoff process
- Achieving handoff_completed for each itinerary requires actions like finalize_incoming_leg_and_release_vehicle_token, finalize_outgoing_leg_and_release_vehicle_token, and finalize_facility_and_release_vehicle_token.
- Prior steps include storage_assigned, triggered by issue_storage_receipt_to_itinerary, which needs handoff_acknowledged, obtained via finalize_container_preparation or similar actions.

## Understanding vehicle allocation

- Vehicle allocation involves actions like assign_transfer_vehicle_instance, requiring incoming and outgoing legs to be buffered and ready, with pickup and dropoff options ready and vehicle available.
- Legs need to be buffered and ready before vehicle assignment, which can be achieved through reserving pickups or preparing pickups and confirming with an operator.

## Exploring leg preparation paths

- Reserve_pickup_option_and_container sets buffered status, while finalize_incoming_pickup later sets ready, returning luggage availability.
- Alternatively, prepare_incoming_leg_pickup sets ready, followed by confirm_incoming_pickup_with_operator, which sets both buffered and ready.

## Outlining preparation steps

- For incoming_leg_1, start by registering the itinerary, reserving a vehicle, allocating a time slot, and confirming the schedule.
- Then, prepare the pickup by selecting a pickup option and assigning an operator, ensuring readiness for vehicle allocation.

## Detailing leg preparation steps  
- Register incoming_leg_1, reserve vehicle_token_1, allocate timeslot_1, and confirm the schedule to set the foundation.  
- Prepare pickup by selecting pickup_option_main_entrance, assign operator_staff_1, and confirm to ensure incoming_leg_1 is buffered and ready.  

## Managing time slot allocation  
- Release operator and time slot after preparation to free resources, ensuring incoming_leg_1 remains buffered and ready.  
- Repeat the process for outgoing_leg_1, reserving vehicle_token_2 and preparing dropoff_option_main_exit to achieve buffered and ready status.  

## Assigning vehicle and resolving binding issues  
- Assign transfer_shuttle_1 to both legs after ensuring both are buffered and ready, linking pickup and dropoff options.  
- Address time slot binding conflicts by releasing the slot from outgoing_leg_1 and reallocating to incoming_leg_1 for vehicle preparation.  

## Handling leg handoff  
- Prepare the vehicle for handling, requiring a valid time slot binding for incoming_leg_1, and complete the handoff process.  
- Complete handoff for both legs, ensuring handoff_acknowledged status, which is needed for issuing receipts and further actions.

## Completing leg processes

- Issue storage receipt for incoming_leg_1 using storage_receipt_1 and timeslot_1, ensuring acknowledged and bound status.
- Finalize incoming_leg_1, releasing vehicle_token_1 and storage_receipt_1, marking it completed and resources available.

## Managing resource allocation for outgoing leg

- Release timeslot_1 from incoming_leg_1 to free it for outgoing_leg_1, ensuring no binding conflicts.
- Allocate timeslot_1 to outgoing_leg_1, issue storage receipt, and finalize, releasing vehicle_token_2 and completing the process.

## Handling facility operations

- Facilities like central_storage_facility and satellite_storage_facility require handoff_acknowledged status, achieved through actions like finalize_container_preparation or acknowledge_final_handoff_for_facility.
- Facility readiness for handoff comes from authorize_facility_service_slot actions, ensuring equipment and service slot availability.

## Processing facility itinerary  
- Confirm central_storage_facility schedule using timeslot_1, ensuring vehicle_token_3 is available and allocated.  
- Release timeslot_1 from outgoing_leg_1 to free it for central_storage_facility, enabling schedule confirmation.  

## Assigning resources to facility  
- Assign service_slot_10am and equipment_trolley_1 to central_storage_facility, ensuring operator_staff_1 is available post-legs.  
- Reserve and provision storage_container_101 for central_storage_facility, linking it to transfer_shuttle_1 and timeslot_1.  

## Preparing facility for handoff  
- Stage central_storage_facility for handoff with equipment_trolley_1, operator_staff_1, and storage_container_101, setting equipment_ready status.  
- Authorize service slot and achieve ready_for_handoff status, enabling finalize_container_preparation for central_storage_facility.  

## Finalizing facility operations  
- Finalize central_storage_facility preparation, setting handoff_acknowledged and enabling receipt issuance.  
- Issue storage_receipt_1 to central_storage_facility, bind to timeslot_1, and release vehicle_token_3 upon completion.

pddl2nl_prompt.note: autoplanbench_pddl2nl: run_save_descriptions.py --type full — шаблоны/JSON, без вызова LLM на построение промпта для сэмпла.

domain_setup.note: Файл domain_llm_usage_seedN.json не найден для section/subsection этого id (старый autoplanbench или домен не пересобирали). После run_domain_setup с обновлённым autoplanbench файл появится рядом с domain_description_seedN.json.

pipeline_usage.totals_scope_note: Per-run totals = planning + pddl2nl_prompt + nl2pddl (только tracked=true). domain_setup всегда вне totals (included_in_per_run_totals=false); цифры в блоке — для справки, агрегировать отдельно: domain_llm_usage_seed*.json + дедуп в collect_pipeline_token_usage.py.
